arts.ttl: Arsenal receive major Viktor Gyokeres transfer update as January reality now clear
arts.sum: That means Gyokeres will still be playing Champions League football next month and should only aid Sporting in holding onto the player beyond Monday's transfer deadline . The teenage striker started in place of Gyokeres for the second time in a week, having also done so away against RB Leipzig in their penultimate league phase game.

arts.ttl: Arsenal have decision to make over Tel, Duran and Ferguson transfers
arts.sum: Given Arsenal's need for a new striker before the January transfer market closes for business, Mikel Arteta's side should be all over Jhon Duran. The Aston Villa striker has proved himself in the Premier League, despite his limited chances under Unai emery.

arts.ttl: Thierry Henry has already delivered Ollie Watkins verdict amid Arsenal bid for Aston Villa star
arts.sum: Arsenal have been looking for a striker all month and, on Wednesday, they tried their luck with a bid for Aston Villa’s Ollie Watkins. The...

arts.ttl: 'It's funny': Girona attacker Arnaut Danjuma names the Arsenal player his side targeted last night
Mikel Arteta receives vital Arsenal cash injection ahead of transfer deadline day
arts.sum: Arsenal’s revenue jumped by a third, from £463m to £616m, a new club record, as the Gunners competed in the Champions League for the first time in six seasons. “The publication of the 2025 Deloitte Football Money League last week saw the club jump three places to seventh among world clubs, leapfrogging Chelsea, Tottenham Hotspur and Liverpool when it came to total revenue.

arts.ttl: Arsenal in Real Madrid battle for €50m wonderkid
arts.sum: Ancelotti has already confirmed that Real Madrid are keeping tabs on Paz with a view to potentially bringing him back to the club eventually, but they will also stand to benefit if Como were to sell to someone else. Arsenal have been keeping tabs on the development of Como youngster Nico Paz, according to Italian media.

arts.ttl: Ollie Watkins won't force Arsenal move
arts.sum: Romano reveals Arsenal's £60m bid for Watkins was rejected by Aston Villa.

arts.ttl: Champions League draw: Who could Liverpool Arsenal, Manchester City, Aston Villa face in the round of 16?
arts.sum: Premier League sides now know who they can face in the next round of the Champions League following the conclusion of the league phase of the competition on Wednesday.

arts.ttl: Ollie Watkins breaks silence amid Arsenal transfer links with 'special' Aston Villa message
arts.sum: Aston Villa striker Ollie Watkins has spoken out for the first time since reports of Arsenal's opening offer being rejected emerged. Reports have stated that Villa turned the bid down from the Gunners but another offer is anticipated before the January transfer window closes on Monday night.

All the goals came in the first half, and Arnaut Danjuma gave the hosts a surprise lead against the run of play, but we turned things around with two goals in four minutes thanks to a Jorginho penalty and a fine Ethan Nwaneri effort. Raheem Sterling missed a penalty deep into second-half stoppage-time, but enough had been done to secure our sixth win from eight matches in the competition this term to finish only behind Liverpool and Barcelona, and allow us the chance to watch what happens in the play-off round next month from afar.
